title: Private Run Results and Decision Package v5.3
previousPackage: Private Stress Lab Run Pack v5.2
recommendedDecision: Use v5.3 as the post-run decision board for controlled fake/sample outcomes. Proceed to limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, and live Decidim access remain blocked until every P0 outcome passes, every P0 evidence item is accepted, every P0 issue is closed, and every required owner signs off privately.
resultsRule: Use v5.3 after a controlled fake/sample private run to record P0 outcomes, accepted evidence status, issues, owner signoffs, repeat actions, and final proceed/repeat/no-go decisions without publishing private evidence.
evidenceAcceptanceRule: Private evidence is never published; the public package may show only fake/sample acceptance status, custody placeholders, issue counts, approved public lines, and next actions.
defectRule: Any P0 Hold, Repeat required, No-go, Missing evidence, Rejected evidence, or Open P0 issue blocks limited private pilot, provider real-record access, outbound email, official Toastmasters workflows, and live Decidim access.
finalGateRule: Proceed to any limited private pilot remains blocked until every P0 outcome is Pass, every P0 evidence item is Accepted, every P0 issue is Closed, and required owners sign off privately.

sourceAnchors.label: v4.8 Pilot Decision and Build Handoff Room
v4.9 Private Owner Decision Meeting Pack
v5.0 Private Decision Execution Control Pack
v5.1 Private Evidence Stress Test Lab Pack
v5.2 Private Stress Lab Run Pack

p0Outcomes.decision: Hold until private authority chair is named and records authority proof.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: Authority gates remain private and unresolved; no pilot has been approved.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Name authority chair and repeat authority proof run.

p0Outcomes.decision: Repeat until consent, notice, withdrawal, and storage wording pass.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: Privacy and consent controls remain under private review.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Rewrite consent copy and repeat the fake/sample consent run.

p0Outcomes.decision: Email remains disabled until outbound route proof is accepted.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: No outbound email is active for real participants.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Repeat email-disabled test and add screenshot custody reference privately.

p0Outcomes.decision: Repeat until export, delete, and retention proof is accepted.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: Data export, deletion, and retention controls remain under private review.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Run export/delete/retention drill with fake records and record private evidence.

p0Outcomes.scenario: Support complaint and pause route failure
p0Outcomes.decision: Hold until complaint, pause, escalation, and closeout routes are proven.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: Support routes are not live services.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Complete support pause drill and owner review.

p0Outcomes.decision: No-go for any official Toastmasters workflow until official route is approved.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: First Nations Toastmasters remains a fake/sample guest and boundary tester only.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Keep official systems out of scope and name the external official-route owner.

p0Outcomes.decision: Pass for fake/sample run only; credentials and logs did not enter public package.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: No credentials or private logs are published in the public demo.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Carry forward security checklist for next repeat run.

p0Outcomes.decision: Hold until evidence custody ledger is accepted and public replacements are confirmed.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: Private evidence is not published in the public package.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Complete evidence redaction review and private custody index.

p0Outcomes.decision: Pass for controlled fake/sample organisation path only.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: Barayamal remains a controlled fake/sample organisation test path.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Keep blocked field list visible in sample runbook.

p0Outcomes.scenario: Guest support mistaken for member service
p0Outcomes.decision: Hold until wording and support routing make the guest/member boundary unmistakable.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: First Nations Toastmasters sample records do not represent official member services.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Rewrite guest-support copy and repeat sample workflow review.

p0Outcomes.decision: Repeat provider-boundary drill and reject any real-record request.
p0Outcomes.publicLine: No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
p0Outcomes.nextAction: Retest provider request flow and prepare fake/sample-only RFQ language.

evidenceAcceptances.gap: Named chair and authority minute absent
Proof accepted but final copy not approved
Support copy too close to member service
Repeat drill required after RFQ wording update

evidenceAcceptances.publicReplacement: Aggregate First Nations Toastmasters sample status only

issueRecords.summary: Authority chair not named in private evidence
issueRecords.fix: Name chair and record private authority minute
Rewrite notice and rerun consent drill

issueRecords.summary: Outbound email disabled proof not fully accepted
issueRecords.fix: Record disabled-email proof and public-safe copy
Keep fake guest-only path and name official-route owner
Complete custody ledger and redaction review

issueRecords.summary: Provider real-record rejection flow needs repeat
issueRecords.impact: Provider could ask for real records
issueRecords.fix: Rerun provider drill with approved rejection wording

issueRecords.summary: Business-sensitive sample fields were visible in one draft
issueRecords.fix: Blocked fields removed from public sample

issueRecords.summary: Guest copy reads like member service in three samples
One public line implied launch timing
Backup restore proof not linked to final gate
issueRecords.fix: Attach restore proof to decision minute
Add revoke/expiry evidence to private ledger
Normalized sample labels in v5.3 package

issueRecords.summary: Results board not available in v5.2
issueRecords.fix: Added v5.3 decision board and ledger
Added final decision and next-action registers

providerResults.test: Provider asks for real participant records
providerResults.providerAsk: Can you send the real intake spreadsheet?
providerResults.response: Reject and provide fake/sample schema only.
providerResults.decision: Pass only if request is rejected

providerResults.test: Provider asks for official Toastmasters member list
providerResults.providerAsk: Can we import current member data?
providerResults.response: Reject and state official records are out of scope.
providerResults.nextAction: Keep official-route owner in approval loop

providerResults.test: Provider asks to enable outbound email
providerResults.providerAsk: Can we turn on email invitations?

providerResults.response: Reject; use least privilege only after approval.

providerResults.test: Provider requests logs with private evidence

providerResults.response: Require restore proof before next step.

providerResults.test: Provider asks to invite real users
Provider asks for public launch wording
providerResults.providerAsk: Can we say launch is coming?

ownerSignoffs.scope: Build, custodian support, and trusted review
Consent, notice, outbound email, privacy review
ownerSignoffs.holdReason: Consent and email proof need repeat

ownerSignoffs.scope: Data minimisation, export/delete, retention, evidence custody

ownerSignoffs.nextStep: Keep official workflows out of scope

ownerSignoffs.holdReason: Backup link still to be attached to final minute
Guest copy still implies member service in some samples

finalDecisions.requiredBeforeProceed: All P0 outcomes Pass, evidence Accepted, P0 issues Closed, owner signoffs Accepted
finalDecisions.recordedOutcome: Blocked by P0 Hold, Repeat required, No-go, missing evidence, and open issues
finalDecisions.publicOutcome: No live or private pilot approved

finalDecisions.requiredBeforeProceed: Any P0 Hold, Repeat required, or missing evidence
finalDecisions.recordedOutcome: Ready because several P0 outcomes require repeat

finalDecisions.requiredBeforeProceed: Authority cannot be proven or official boundary remains unresolved after repeat
finalDecisions.recordedOutcome: Available as a valid decision path

finalDecisions.requiredBeforeProceed: Provider boundary tests pass and fake/sample RFQ approved

finalDecisions.recordedOutcome: Mostly accepted; two repeat records remain

finalDecisions.requiredBeforeProceed: Authority, privacy, data, support, official boundary, provider, and final minute pass

publicSummaryLines.approvedPublicLine: The public demo remains a fake/sample preparation tool; no live pilot has been approved.
A controlled fake/sample results board now records what would be accepted, held, repeated, or blocked.
Barayamal is represented as a controlled First Nations organisation sample using fake/sample records only.
First Nations Toastmasters is represented as a fake guest/member-boundary sample only.
publicSummaryLines.blockedLanguage: Official Toastmasters members are being onboarded.

publicSummaryLines.approvedPublicLine: Privacy and consent controls remain under private owner review.
No provider has access to real participant, organisation, or Toastmasters records.
publicSummaryLines.blockedLanguage: A provider is reviewing real data.

publicSummaryLines.approvedPublicLine: Private evidence is not published in the public package.
publicSummaryLines.blockedLanguage: Evidence can be shared on request.

publicSummaryLines.approvedPublicLine: The next valid operating step is a repeat private fake/sample stress run or a no-go/archive decision.
No live Decidim access is approved by this public demo.
Dean Foley / Barayamal may advise and review, but named owners must approve their own gates privately.
publicSummaryLines.blockedLanguage: Dean approval is enough to proceed.

nextActions.action: Name private authority chair and alternate
Rewrite consent, notice, withdrawal, and outbound email wording
Repeat export, delete, retention, and evidence custody drill
Run complaint, pause, escalation, and closeout drill
Confirm official Toastmasters boundary remains out of scope
Approve fake/sample-only RFQ language and retest real-record rejection
Rewrite First Nations Toastmasters guest-support copy
Attach backup restore and access-expiry proof to private ledger
Revise two held Barayamal sample records
Add v5.3 docs to reviewer pack
Review v5.3 board as advisory/trusted reviewer
